title: scutellaria rupestris subsp. parnassica
intro: Scutellaria rupestris subsp. parnassica, also known as Balkan skullcap, is a subspecies of perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria rupestris subsp. parnassica include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve symptoms associated with anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Scutellaria rupestris subsp. parnassica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and well-being.
